## RPC contract

| RPC | gRPC | REST |
|-----|------|------|
| GroupService/AddMember | (AddGroupMemberRequest) → operation.Operation | POST /iam/v1/groups/{group_id}:addMember |
| GroupService/Create | (CreateGroupRequest) → operation.Operation | POST /iam/v1/groups |
| GroupService/Delete | (DeleteGroupRequest) → operation.Operation | DELETE /iam/v1/groups/{group_id} |
| GroupService/Get | (GetGroupRequest) → Group | GET /iam/v1/groups/{group_id} |
| GroupService/List | (ListGroupsRequest) → ListGroupsResponse | GET /iam/v1/groups |
| GroupService/ListMembers | (ListGroupMembersRequest) → ListGroupMembersResponse | GET /iam/v1/groups/{group_id}:listMembers |
| GroupService/ListOperations | (ListGroupOperationsRequest) → ListGroupOperationsResponse | GET /iam/v1/groups/{group_id}/operations |
| GroupService/RemoveMember | (RemoveGroupMemberRequest) → operation.Operation | POST /iam/v1/groups/{group_id}:removeMember |
| GroupService/Update | (UpdateGroupRequest) → operation.Operation | PATCH /iam/v1/groups/{group_id} |
